# VIPACH — In the Footsteps of Great Photographers

Official project site: https://modell.vipach.at/
Organizer/controller: Zentralverband Ungarischer Vereine und Organisationen in Österreich (ZVR 079797621)
Project brand: VIPACH — Vienna Photo Art & Creative Hub
Location: Vienna, Austria
Curator: Norbert Bánhalmi, fine art photographer and VIPACH founder
Languages: Hungarian, English, German
Application deadline: 2026-08-31; maximum 20 adult participants
Planned exhibition: November 2026, Vienna; exact date and venue are confirmed separately
Participation contribution: EUR 299 per selected participant, described as material and production cost contribution
Estimated total professional and production value: EUR 1,200; this is not a former selling price or percentage discount
Package: personalised portrait shoot, 10 retouched digital portraits, one custom 50 × 70 cm lenticular artwork from two selected portraits, about one week in a Vienna gallery, elegant champagne opening, artwork transferred to participant after exhibition
Contract: the application form itself creates no payment obligation; a contract arises only through a separate confirmation after selection
Lenticular artwork: a physical optical print that displays different images from different viewing angles
Privacy: application data is processed for pre-contractual steps; Google Ireland services are used for form transmission, Sheets storage and email delivery
Legal pages: /hu/aszf/, /en/terms/, /de/agb/ and corresponding privacy, imprint and withdrawal pages
